name: Jailbird Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Put water in the bowl of a food processor.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over water and soak for 10 minutes.
3. Turn on the food processor, add lemon juice, and turn off when finished blending.
4. Add sugar, egg yolks, and vanilla to the food processor; process for 5 minutes.
5. Scrape the sides of the bowl, let the mixture cool.
6. Whip cream separately and fold into the lemon mixture.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the lemon mixture.
9. Pile the batter into a 1-quart souffle dish with a waxed paper collar secured with masking tape.
10. Smooth the top of the souffle.
11. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight before serving.
12. To serve, carefully remove the collar and decorate with whipped cream rosettes around the edge of the top and in the center.
13. Garnish with a twisted lemon slice and mint leaves if desired.
